Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ‘Intergenerational war’: Wild Budget claim
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese is promising a federal budget to help younger Australians get ahead. But the Coalition says he is waging an “intergenerational war”.

news.title: ASX extends losing streak as inflation jumps; G8 Education slumps
news.snippet: Sharemarket trims early losses after latest figures show inflation is not as high as investors feared.

news.title: Rents will rise but won’t be ‘supercharged’ under negative gearing, CGT changes: expert
news.snippet: Fierce debate rages as government prepares to unveil a move that could change everything for renters and investors alike.

news.title: Frontline workers to benefit from huge housing boost
news.snippet: Frontline workers in seven cities across one Aussie state are set to benefit from hundreds of millions of dollars being invested into housing stock.

news.title: West Wits cashes WA gold project, keeps upside play
news.snippet: West Wits is offloading its WA Mt Cecelia project but keeping skin in the game, locking in equity, royalties and milestone upside while freeing up capital to push its South African gold ambitions.

news.title: Chariot firms grip on district-scale Nigerian lithium portfolio
news.snippet: Chariot Resources has secured five key licences for its 254-square-kilometre Nigerian lithium play and extended its acquisition deadline to August to wrap up the deal.

news.title: The next casualty of Trump’s war is already here
news.snippet: It is the coldest-known substance on Earth used in a number of crucial parts of the global economy. And we are running low.

news.title: Kaiser pumps up cash stash from Tasmanian gold mine
news.snippet: Kaiser Reef has pumped out a stellar $14.28M in operating net cash and boosted its cash stash to $45.6M at the end of March from its Henty gold mine in Tasmania.

news.title: Eclipse shares surge on big upgrade at Greenland rare earths play
news.snippet: Eclipse Metals has surged after doubling its Greenlandic rare earths project’s resource to 208Mt, including some 456,000 tonnes of the highly sought-after permanent magnet metals.

news.title: Locksley taps Columbia Uni tech to fast-track US rare earths
news.snippet: Locksley Resources is advancing rare earths processing options for its US Mojave project with Columbia University, aiming to simplify recovery and separation flowsheets.

news.title: In signing Jarome Luai, Papua New Guinea's power has become real
‘Distressing situation’: Indian man brings sister’s corpse to bank to withdraw $300
news.snippet: A man in India has made headlines for bringing his sister’s corpse to the bank after growing frustrated at the procedure for withdrawing money from her account.
